visual_description: The man in a blue polo shirt sits on an orange couch, extending his right hand to shake the hand of a partially visible woman seated to his left. He smiles broadly with crinkled eyes while maintaining eye contact, his posture upright and leaning slightly forward. The background shows a coffee shop environment with a green column, tables, and a person holding a white cup.
